question: リピート顧客の比率を教えてください
answer:
結論:
リピート顧客の比率は約96.6%です。

使用条件:
全期間（2022〜2026年4月）、全商品タイプ・全セグメント・全顧客を対象。

主要指標:
- アクティブ顧客数（期間内で1件以上予約のあった顧客数）：9,930人
- リピート顧客数（期間内で2件以上予約した顧客）：9,594人
- リピート率：96.6%（9,594人 / 9,930人）

補足:
非常に高いリピート率が特徴です。ロイヤルカスタマーが多いことを示しています。分析の次のステップとして、年代やセグメント別にリピート率の差異を見ると改善ポイントが見えてきます。

question: 円安後の海外売上回復の度合いを教えてください

function.arguments: {"natural_language_description":"2022年から2025年の決済通貨別（JPY, USD, EUR）の売上額と構成比を年度別で教えてください。"}
function.name: generate.filename

function.arguments: {"datasource_name":"travelIQ_v2","datasource_type":"Ontology","datasource_artifact_id":"10cd6675-405a-4366-b91b-d57242a28914","datasource_workspace_id":"096ff72a-6174-4aba-8f0c-140454fa6c3f","natural_language_query":"2022年から2025年の決済通貨別（JPY, USD, EUR）の売上額と構成比を年度別で教えてください。","code":"```ontology\n{\"entitySelector\":{\"queryType\":\"GQL\",\"query\":\"MATCH (node_payment:`payment`)-[edge_payment_has_booking:`payment_has_booking`]->(node_booking:`booking`)\\nWHERE (LOWER(node_payment.`currency`) = LOWER(\\\"JPY\\\") OR LOWER(node_payment.`currency`) = LOWER(\\\"USD\\\") OR LOWER(node_payment.`currency`) = LOWER(\\\"EUR\\\"))\\n  AND node_payment.`paid_at` >= ZONED_DATETIME(\\\"2022-01-01T00:00:00.000+09:00\\\") AND node_payment.`paid_at` < ZONED_DATETIME(\\\"2026-01-01T00:00:00.000+09:00\\\")\\nLET payment_year = node_payment.`paid_at`.year\\nRETURN \\n  node_payment.`payment_id` AS `payment_id`,\\n  node_booking.`booking_id` AS `booking_id`,\\n  payment_year AS `year`,\\n  node_payment.`currency` AS `currency`,\\n  node_payment.`amount_jpy` AS `amount_jpy`\"},\"timeSeriesSelector\":{\"entityType\":{\"name\":\"payment\"},\"keyColumns\":{\"payment_id\":\"payment_id\"},\"metrics\":[{\"field\":\"amount_jpy\",\"aggregation\":\"Sum\",\"alias\":\"TotalAmountJPY\"}],\"timeRange\":{\"start\":\"2022-01-01T00:00:00Z\",\"end\":\"2025-12-31T23:59:59Z\"},\"sort\":[],\"groupBy\":[\"currency\"]}}\n```"}
function.name: analyze.database.execute

Cause: error: data exception; Type ZONED DATETIME does not have properties.."

function.arguments: {"natural_language_description":"2022年から2025年までの海外旅行（destination_type='outbound'）の売上推移（年度別売上、予約件数、1人あたり単価）を教えてください。比較のため国内旅行も同時に出してください。"}
function.name: generate.filename

function.arguments: {"datasource_name":"travelIQ_v2","datasource_type":"Ontology","datasource_artifact_id":"10cd6675-405a-4366-b91b-d57242a28914","datasource_workspace_id":"096ff72a-6174-4aba-8f0c-140454fa6c3f","natural_language_query":"2022年から2025年までの海外旅行（destination_type='outbound'）の売上推移（年度別売上、予約件数、1人あたり単価）を教えてください。比較のため国内旅行も同時に出してください。","code":"```ontology\n{\"entitySelector\":{\"queryType\":\"GQL\",\"query\":\"MATCH (node_booking:`booking`)\\nWHERE (LOWER(node_booking.`destination_type`) = LOWER(\\\"outbound\\\") OR LOWER(node_booking.`destination_type`) = LOWER(\\\"domestic\\\"))\\n  AND node_booking.`booking_date` >= ZONED_DATETIME(\\\"2022-01-01T00:00:00.000+09:00\\\")\\n  AND node_booking.`booking_date` < ZONED_DATETIME(\\\"2026-01-01T00:00:00.000+09:00\\\")\\nRETURN\\n  node_booking.`booking_id` AS `booking_id`,\\n  node_booking.`destination_type` AS `destination_type`,\\n  node_booking.`booking_date` AS `booking_date`,\\n  node_booking.`total_revenue_jpy` AS `total_revenue_jpy`,\\n  node_booking.`price_per_person_jpy` AS `price_per_person_jpy`\\nORDER BY booking_date, destination_type\"},\"timeSeriesSelector\":{\"entityType\":{\"name\":\"booking\"},\"keyColumns\":{\"booking_id\":\"booking_id\"},\"metrics\":[{\"field\":\"total_revenue_jpy\",\"aggregation\":\"Sum\",\"alias\":\"total_revenue_sum\"},{\"field\":\"booking_id\",\"aggregation\":\"Count\",\"alias\":\"booking_count\"},{\"field\":\"price_per_person_jpy\",\"aggregation\":\"Average\",\"alias\":\"price_per_person_avg\"}],\"sampling\":\"31536000\",\"timeRange\":{\"start\":\"2022-01-01T00:00:00Z\",\"end\":\"2025-12-31T23:59:59Z\"},\"sort\":[],\"groupBy\":[]}}\n```"}
function.name: analyze.database.execute

function.arguments: {"natural_language_description":"2022年から2025年までの外貨建て決済（USD/EUR）の売上合計と平均為替レート（年度別）を出してください。"}
function.name: generate.filename

function.arguments: {"datasource_name":"travelIQ_v2","datasource_type":"Ontology","datasource_artifact_id":"10cd6675-405a-4366-b91b-d57242a28914","datasource_workspace_id":"096ff72a-6174-4aba-8f0c-140454fa6c3f","natural_language_query":"2022年から2025年までの外貨建て決済（USD/EUR）の売上合計と平均為替レート（年度別）を出してください。","code":"```ontology\n{\"entitySelector\":{\"queryType\":\"GQL\",\"query\":\"MATCH (node_payment:`payment`)\\nWHERE (LOWER(node_payment.`currency`) = LOWER(\\\"USD\\\") OR LOWER(node_payment.`currency`) = LOWER(\\\"EUR\\\")) AND node_payment.`paid_at` >= ZONED_DATETIME(\\\"2022-01-01T00:00:00.000+09:00\\\") AND node_payment.`paid_at` < ZONED_DATETIME(\\\"2026-01-01T00:00:00.000+09:00\\\")\\nLET payment_year = node_payment.`paid_at`.`year`\\nRETURN payment_year AS `year`, SUM(node_payment.`amount_jpy`) AS `total_sales_jpy`, AVG(node_payment.`exchange_rate_to_jpy`) AS `avg_exchange_rate`\\nGROUP BY year\\nORDER BY year ASC\"},\"timeSeriesSelector\":{\"entityType\":{\"name\":\"payment\"},\"keyColumns\":{\"payment_id\":\"payment_id\"},\"metrics\":[{\"field\":\"amount_jpy\",\"aggregation\":\"Sum\",\"alias\":\"total_sales_jpy\"},{\"field\":\"exchange_rate_to_jpy\",\"aggregation\":\"Average\",\"alias\":\"avg_exchange_rate\"}],\"sampling\":\"31536000\",\"timeRange\":{\"start\":\"2022-01-01T00:00:00Z\",\"end\":\"2026-01-01T00:00:00Z\"},\"sort\":[{\"field\":\"total_sales_jpy\",\"order\":\"Ascending\"}],\"groupBy\":[\"payment_id\"]}}\n```"}
function.name: analyze.database.execute

# Variation 1

```ontology
{"entitySelector":{"queryType":"GQL","query":"MATCH (node_booking:`booking`)
WHERE (LOWER(node_booking.`destination_type`) = LOWER("outbound") OR LOWER(node_booking.`destination_type`) = LOWER("domestic"))
  AND node_booking.`booking_date` >= ZONED_DATETIME("2022-01-01T00:00:00.000+09:00")
  AND node_booking.`booking_date` < ZONED_DATETIME("2026-01-01T00:00:00.000+09:00")
RETURN
  node_booking.`booking_id` AS `booking_id`,
  node_booking.`destination_type` AS `destination_type`,
  node_booking.`booking_date` AS `booking_date`,
  node_booking.`total_revenue_jpy` AS `total_revenue_jpy`,
  node_booking.`price_per_person_jpy` AS `price_per_person_jpy`
ORDER BY booking_date, destination_type"},"timeSeriesSelector":{"entityType":{"name":"booking"},"keyColumns":{"booking_id":"booking_id"},"metrics":[{"field":"total_revenue_jpy","aggregation":"Sum","alias":"total_revenue_sum"},{"field":"booking_id","aggregation":"Count","alias":"booking_count"},{"field":"price_per_person_jpy","aggregation":"Average","alias":"price_per_person_avg"}],"sampling":"31536000","timeRange":{"start":"2022-01-01T00:00:00Z","end":"2025-12-31T23:59:59Z"},"sort":[],"groupBy":[]}}
```

question: インバウンド比率の四半期推移を教えてください
